findings.title: shuxueslpi/chatGLM-6B-QLoRA
findings.description: 使用peft库，对chatGLM-6B/chatGLM2-6B实现4bit的QLoRA高效微调，并做lora model和base model的merge及4bit的量化（quantize）。

findings.title: htqin/IR-QLoRA
findings.description: [ICML 2024 Oral] This project is the official implementation of our Accurate LoRA-Finetuning Quantization of LLMs via Information Retention

findings.title: di37/finetuning-quantize-evaluate
findings.description: Fine-Tune, Quantize, Evaluate: The Complete Guide — LLMs, VLMs, and Embedding Models

findings.title: 0xZee/DeepSeek-R1-FineTuning
findings.description: Fine-Tuning of DeepSeek-Style Reasoning Models | RL + Quantization Implementation

findings.title: DevDizzle/lora-finetune-lab
findings.description: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning of LLMs using QLoRA — 4-bit quantization, PEFT adapters, W&B experiment tracking

findings.title: Minami-su/deepspeed-grpo-qlora-vllm
findings.description: This repository, deepspeed-grpo-qlora-vllm, provides a complete framework for fine-tuning LLMs using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on 4-bit quantized models (QLoRA). It utilizes DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 for scalable training and integrates with a VLLM server to dynamically serve the fine-tuned LoRA adapters.

findings.title: prakash-aryan/qwen-arabic-project
findings.description: This project fine-tunes the Qwen2-1.5B model for Arabic language tasks using Quantized LoRA (QLoRA).

findings.title: kapshaul/LLM-finetune-vuln-detection
findings.description: Fine-tuning a Large Language Model (LLM) for code vulnerability detection using QLoRA, a method that quantizes the model to 4-bit floats and incorporates adapters for fine-tuning.

findings.title: SuleynanAuir/Distributed-Fine-Tuning-of-Qwen2.5-7B-as-HotelService-Master
findings.description: Hotel-domain conversational assistant using Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, focusing on practical, reproducible fine-tuning. It supports SFT + LoRA for a stable baseline, SFT + QLoRA for 7B model training with 4-bit quantization under limited GPU memory, and DPO to enhance responses via human preference pairs

findings.title: anantha119/EffiLLaMA
findings.description: Finetuning LLaMA 3.2-1B-Instruct model using qLoRA and LoRA quantization PEFT methods

findings.title: HemantBK/LLaMA-Sum-Fine-Tuning
findings.description: Fine-tuned Meta's LLaMA 3.2 1B for text summarization using QLoRA (4-bit quantization + LoRA), achieving 40%+ improvement in ROUGE-2 over the base model on CNN/DailyMail dataset.

findings.title: SHIVITG/FineTune-Phi-2-LLM-using-PEFT-QLora
findings.description: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) is a crucial step in adapting these powerful models to specific tasks or domains. In this seminar code tutorial, we will explore how to perform fine-tuning using QLoRA (Quantized LoRA), a memory-efficient iteration of LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), for parameter-efficient fine-tuning.

findings.title: YaseenMunowwar/Fine-Tune-LLAMA-2-With-Custom-Dataset-Using-LoRA-And-QLoRA-Techniques
findings.description: This repository provides a comprehensive guide and implementation for fine-tuning the LLAMA 2 language model using custom datasets. By using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA), it enables efficient and scalable model fine-tuning, making it suitable for resource-limited environments.

findings.title: shaadclt/Fine-Tune-Llama2-LoRA-QLoRA
findings.description: This repository contains the code for fine-tuning the Llama-2-7b-chat model on a text instruction dataset using LoRA (Layer-wise Only Relevant Attention) and QLoRA (Quantized LoRA).

findings.title: alishafique3/Finetuning_Of_LLM_On_Single_GPU_Using_QLoRA
findings.description: In this project, LLM (model: T5-3b) is finetuned on a single GPU for summarization task. Memory footprints of the model is reduced using PEFT technique called Quantized LoRA.

findings.title: Yousra-Chahinez/llama-qlora-finetuning-arabic-sentiment-analysis
findings.description: This repository contains a notebook for fine-tuning the meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct (or any other generative language models) model using Quantized LoRA (QLoRA) for sentiment classification on the Arabic HARD dataset.

findings.title: AhmadShayan1112/Fine-Tuning-DeepSeek-R1-with-QLoRA
findings.description: Fine-tune DeepSeek R1 using QLoRA for efficient, low-resource training on GPUs like NVIDIA P100. Leverages Hugging Face, PEFT, and bitsandbytes for 4-bit quantized LoRA training with mixed precision. Includes model saving, evaluation, and custom dataset support.

findings.title: KyriakosTop/bert-distilbert-compression
findings.description: Compression of DistilBERT & BERT using quantization, pruning, and LoRA/QLoRA — MSc project

findings.title: KusumDevanath/Fine-Tuning-Fontier-LLMs-with-LoRA-QLoRA
findings.description: This project focuses on parameter-efficient fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs) using LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) and QLoRA (Quantized LoRA) techniques. The objective is to adapt a pretrained LLM to a domain-specific enterprise dataset while minimizing computational cost, memory usage, and training time.

findings.title: happybear-21/genie
findings.description: A robust pipeline for fine-tuning language models using advanced techniques like LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), QLoRA (Quantized LoRA), and custom tokenization.
